title: Pvrig-binding agents and uses thereof
abstract: Agents that specifically bind PVRIG are disclosed. The PVRIG-binding agents may include polypeptides, antibodies, bispecific agents, and/or heterodimeric molecules. Also disclosed are methods of using the agents for enhancing the immune response and/or treatment of diseases such as cancer.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. An isolated antibody that specifically binds the extracellular domain of human PVRIG, which comprises: (a) a heavy chain CDR1 comprising GYSFTDYTMS (SEQ ID NO:5), a heavy chain CDR2 comprising LIVPYSGGTNYSQKFKG (SEQ ID NO:6), and a heavy chain CDR3 comprising EGYGYVMDY (SEQ ID NO:7), and/or (b) a light chain CDR1 comprising KASQDVSTAVA (SEQ ID NO:8), a light chain CDR2 comprising SASYRYT (SEQ ID NO:9), and a light chain CDR3 comprising QQHYSTP (SEQ ID NO: 10). 2. An isolated antibody that specifically binds human PVRIG, which comprises a heavy chain variable region having at least 90% sequence identity to SEQ ID NO: 11 ; and/or a light chain variable region having at least 90% sequence identity to SEQ ID NO: 12. 3. The antibody of claim 1 or claim 2, which comprises a heavy chain variable region having at least 95% sequence identity to SEQ ID NO: 11 ; and/or a light chain variable region having at least 95% sequence identity to SEQ ID NO: 12. 4. The antibody of claim 3, which comprises a heavy chain variable region comprising SEQ ID NO: l 1 and a light chain variable region comprising SEQ ID NO: 12. 5. The antibody of claim 11 , which is an IgGl antibody, an IgG2 antibody, or an IgG4 antibody. 13. An antibody comprising the same heavy chain variable region and the light chain variable region amino acid sequences as antibody 334MXX. 14. An isolated antibody that competes with the antibody of any one of claims 1-13 for specific binding to PVRIG. 15. An isolated antibody that binds the same epitope on PVRIG as the antibody of any one of claims 1-13. 16. An isolated antibody that binds an epitope on PVRIG that overlaps with the epitope on PVRIG bound by the antibody of any one of claims 1-13. 17. The antibody of any one of claims 1-16, which inhibits binding of PVRIG to polio virus receptor- related immunoglobulin domain-containing protein 2 (PVRL2). 18. The antibody of any one of claims 1-16, which inhibits or blocks the interaction between PVRIG and PVRL2. 19. The antibody of any one of claims 1-16, which inhibits PVRIG signaling. 20.
